# Client test for mcp-scripttest-server
# This tests MCP client code against a mock server

# Start the scripttest server with the filesystem server script
mcp-scripttest-server -script testdata/server_scripts/filesystem.txt -port 8082 &
sleep 1

# Create a simple mcp-client to test with
cd ${WORK}
cat > mcp_client_test.go << 'EOF'
package main

import (
	"bytes"
	"encoding/json"
	"fmt"
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

func main() {
	if len(os.Args) < 3 {
		fmt.Println("Usage: mcp_client_test <method> <path>")
		os.Exit(1)
	}

	method := os.Args[1]
	path := os.Args[2]

	// Initialize client
	initRequest := map[string]interface{}{
		"jsonrpc": "2.0",
		"id":      1,
		"method":  "initialize",
		"params": map[string]interface{}{
			"protocolVersion": "2024-11-05",
		},
	}

	initResponse, err := sendRequest("http://localhost:8082/mcp", initRequest)
	if err != nil {
		fmt.Printf("Error initializing: %v\n", err)
		os.Exit(1)
	}

	fmt.Printf("Initialized with server: %v\n", 
		initResponse["result"].(map[string]interface{})["serverInfo"])

	// Execute the requested method
	var request map[string]interface{}
	
	if method == "read" {
		request = map[string]interface{}{
			"jsonrpc": "2.0",
			"id":      2,
			"method":  "read",
			"params": map[string]interface{}{
				"path": path,
			},
		}
	} else if method == "write" {
		content := "Test content from client"
		if len(os.Args) > 3 {
			content = os.Args[3]
		}
		
		request = map[string]interface{}{
			"jsonrpc": "2.0",
			"id":      2,
			"method":  "write",
			"params": map[string]interface{}{
				"path":    path,
				"content": content,
			},
		}
	} else if method == "delete" {
		request = map[string]interface{}{
			"jsonrpc": "2.0",
			"id":      2,
			"method":  "delete",
			"params": map[string]interface{}{
				"path": path,
			},
		}
	} else {
		fmt.Printf("Unsupported method: %s\n", method)
		os.Exit(1)
	}

	response, err := sendRequest("http://localhost:8082/mcp", request)
	if err != nil {
		fmt.Printf("Error: %v\n", err)
		os.Exit(1)
	}

	// Pretty print the response
	prettyJSON, _ := json.MarshalIndent(response, "", "  ")
	fmt.Println(string(prettyJSON))
}

func sendRequest(url string, request map[string]interface{}) (map[string]interface{}, error) {
	// Marshal request to JSON
	requestJSON, err := json.Marshal(request)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	// Create HTTP request
	req, err := http.NewRequest("POST", url, bytes.NewBuffer(requestJSON))
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")

	// Send request
	client := &http.Client{}
	resp, err := client.Do(req)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	defer resp.Body.Close()

	// Read response
	body, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	// Parse response
	var response map[string]interface{}
	err = json.Unmarshal(body, &response)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	return response, nil
}
EOF

# Build the test client
go build -o mcp_client_test mcp_client_test.go

# Run tests against the mock server
./mcp_client_test write test.txt "Hello from test client"
stdout '"status":"success"'

./mcp_client_test read test.txt
stdout '"content":"Hello from test client"'

./mcp_client_test delete test.txt
stdout '"status":"success"'

./mcp_client_test read test.txt
stdout '"error"'
stdout '"message":"File not found: test.txt"'

# Stop the server
killall mcp-scripttest-server

# Tests completed successfully

-- testdata/server_scripts/filesystem.txt --
# Mock filesystem server for client testing

# Initialize response
expect-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize"}
send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":${ID},"result":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","serverInfo":{"name":"mcp-filesystem-test-server","version":"1.0.0"},"capabilities":{}}}

# Write file
expect-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"write","params":{"path":"*","content":"*"}}
exec mkdir -p $(dirname ${WORKDIR}/${REQUEST.params.path})
exec echo "${REQUEST.params.content}" > ${WORKDIR}/${REQUEST.params.path}
send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":${ID},"result":{"status":"success","path":"${REQUEST.params.path}","size":${#REQUEST.params.content},"message":"File written successfully"}}

# Read file
expect-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"read","params":{"path":"*"}}
# Check if the file exists
exec test -f ${WORKDIR}/${REQUEST.params.path}
if ERRORLEVEL != 0
  send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":${ID},"error":{"code":-32500,"message":"File not found: ${REQUEST.params.path}"}}
else
  set-var FILE_CONTENT = $(cat ${WORKDIR}/${REQUEST.params.path})
  set-var FILE_SIZE = $(wc -c < ${WORKDIR}/${REQUEST.params.path} | tr -d ' ')
  send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":${ID},"result":{"path":"${REQUEST.params.path}","content":"${FILE_CONTENT}","size":${FILE_SIZE},"encoding":"utf-8"}}
endif

# Delete file
expect-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"delete","params":{"path":"*"}}
exec test -f ${WORKDIR}/${REQUEST.params.path}
if ERRORLEVEL != 0
  send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":${ID},"error":{"code":-32500,"message":"File not found: ${REQUEST.params.path}"}}
else
  exec rm ${WORKDIR}/${REQUEST.params.path}
  send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":${ID},"result":{"status":"success","path":"${REQUEST.params.path}","message":"File deleted successfully"}}
endif
